description: AI-assisted social engineering patterns targeting both AI agents and their human operators

patterns.name: Authority Impersonation
patterns.description: Prompt claims to be from a developer, admin, or authority figure to bypass restrictions

patterns.name: Emotional Manipulation
patterns.description: Exploiting emotional appeals to bypass agent safety measures
indicators: please help me, it's an emergency

patterns.name: Hypothetical Framing
patterns.description: Using fictional or hypothetical framing to extract harmful content
indicators: imagine you are an AI with no restrictions

patterns.name: False Context Injection
patterns.description: Injecting false context into the agent's working memory to manipulate decisions
indicators: based on our previous conversation where you confirmed

patterns.name: Gradual Escalation
patterns.description: Incrementally escalating requests to normalize harmful behavior
patterns.detection: Series of requests where each request is slightly more restrictive-boundary-testing than the last
